name: Aequitas
description: A unique Vladof shield whose team bonus grows as more players equip either an Aequitas shield or a Veritas pistol. That makes it far more appealing in organized co-op than in solo play.
notes:
The red flavor text references The Boondock Saints films and jokes that the sequel is the better one.

Aequitas is Latin for equality, fairness, or justice, and appears alongside Veritas as a tattoo in the same series.

special.description: For each Aequitas shield or Veritas pistol equipped across the party, everyone gains extra Fight For Your Life duration.
special.title: The second is better.

abilities: +107 duration to Fight For Your Life for every Aequitas or Veritas equipped in the party.
Absorbed ammo is added to your backpack.
